identity.name: SentinelX Defender
design_principles: Zero-Shadow Policy: Depth is created by borders and contrast, not shadows
Data Density: High density information displayed with Swiss-style clarity
Structural Integrity: Visible grids, corner markers, and defined boundaries
Tactile Flatness: Elements feel like printed ink on high-quality paper

headings.usage: Page titles, Section headers, KPI values

technical.usage: Code blocks, File paths, Hashes, System status, Data values

usage_rules.transparency: Use only for glass/blur effects or borders. No fully transparent content backgrounds.

mosaic_pattern.implementation: Use borders to define the grid. Some cells can be empty to create negative space.

overrides.style: rounded-[0px] or rounded-[2px] border border-border bg-white shadow-none hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors duration-200
rounded-[2px] font-medium shadow-none hover:translate-y-[1px] active:translate-y-[2px] transition-transform
rounded-[0px] border-border bg-transparent shadow-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-primary
rounded-[2px] font-mono uppercase tracking-wider text-[10px] px-2 py-0.5

visual_enhancers.corner_markers: Add absolute positioned 4px x 4px squares or 'L' shapes at corners of key containers (color: primary or accent)
visual_enhancers.square_dots: Use 4px x 4px filled squares for status indicators instead of circles
visual_enhancers.image_treatment: mix-blend-luminosity opacity-90 hover:mix-blend-normal transition-all duration-500 grayscale hover:grayscale-0

elements: File Upload Zone (Dashed border, mono text)
Feature Vector Form (20 inputs, 4 columns grid)
Analysis Results Panel (Slide-in or below, detailed breakdown)
Confidence Gauge (Semi-circle or linear bar, no gradients)
Comparison Charts (Line/Bar charts using Recharts, monochromatic with accents)

assets.icons: Lucide React (Stroke width 1.5px or 1px for elegance)

images.usage: Minimal usage. Mostly for abstract data representations or user avatars.
images.style: Black and white or duotone (Green/White) treatment.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text is #1A3C2B or #3A3A38 on #F7F7F5 background for WCAG AAA.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible 2px offset rings in Primary color.

tech_stack.frontend: React, Tailwind CSS, Shadcn UI, Recharts, Framer Motion

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL FONTS: Add '@fontsource/space-grotesk', '@fontsource/jetbrains-mono', and '@fontsource/general-sans' (if available, else use Google Fonts via CSS).
CONFIGURE TAILWIND: Update `tailwind.config.js` with the specific colors and border radius (0px or 2px).
GLOBAL CSS: Remove all default rounded corners if global radius variable exists.
NO SHADOWS: Override any default shadcn shadow classes.
BENTO GRIDS: Use `grid-cols-12` for main layouts and span items creatively (4, 8, 6).
TEST IDS: Add `data-testid` to all interactive elements.
MOCK DATA: Use realistic cybersecurity terminology (e.g., 'Ransomware.Win32', 'High Heuristic Score', 'Payload Analysis').
ADMIN AUTH: Mock the login flow (accept any valid email/pass or specific hardcoded one for demo).
universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI Slop': No generic centered layouts, no gradients, no rounded buttons.
Micro-interactions: Hover states on table rows (bg-primary/5), buttons (transform), inputs (border color).
Spacing: Use whitespace as a separator instead of lines where possible.
Consistency: Maintain the 'Technical Minimalist' aesthetic across all pages.
